cleavage agent: in-gel proteolyzed with trypsin as described.
fractionation method: subjected to electrophoresis for 5 min on a NuPAGE 4–12% Bis-Tris gel.
instrument: analyzed with an Exploris 480 tandem mass spectrometer...
labeling: Tandem mass spectrometry proteotyping allows the identification of organisms based on peptide sequences...
